files.content:
# Manual restore for critical settings (daily_scripts do NOT auto-run in this env).
# Run as: ./novamind-operation python daily_scripts/restore_settings.py
# Update values here whenever config changes.
import novamind_api as nm

# Current wk31 config (day 217) — flywheel spinning, capacity upgraded to T3 for outage prevention.
ad_spend = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    'content_marketing': {'S1': 550},
    'referral_program': {'S1': 450}
})
dev_spend = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S1': 3000})
daily = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=4000, development=600)
ads_str = nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.25)
lead_promo = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=15.0)
# T3 capacity from wk31 (prevents 100% saturation outages)
cap = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=3)

print(f"Daily restore OK: ops={daily['current']['operations']} dev_global={daily['current']['development']}")
print(f"Ad spend: {ad_spend.get('total_per_day')} /day")
print(f"Ads strength: {ads_str.get('global')}")
print(f"Lead promo: {lead_promo.get('global', 0.0)}%")
print(f"Capacity tier: {cap.get('tier')} ({cap.get('capacity_units'):,} units/day)")
